_note: Single source of truth for prose that would otherwise live in many HTML files. bin/stamp injects each value between matching <!-- INJECT:key.path --> ... <!-- /INJECT --> markers. Edit ONLY here; never edit the injected block in HTML directly (your edit will be overwritten on the next bin/stamp run). Values are inserted verbatim - they are HTML fragments, not plain text.

site.name: learnc
site.index_title: learnc - interactive C in your browser
site.index_meta_description: <meta name="description" content="Two parallel learn-C courses, both runnable in your browser: a hand-revised K&R 2e companion and an English transcript-based companion to Salvatore Sanfilippo's Let's Learn C video series. No signup. No tracking.">
site.index_intro: Two parallel learn-C courses, both runnable in your browser. Pick one and start reading - every code sample on every page is editable and compiles in-browser via WebAssembly. No signup. No tracking.

kr.page_meta_description: <meta name="description" content="A hand-revised, runnable companion to The C Programming Language (Kernighan & Ritchie, 2e). Every example runs in your browser. No signup. No tracking. Prose verified against K&R.">
kr.page_intro: An opinionated learning notebook to read through The C Programming Language (Kernighan & Ritchie, 2e), and each section is written in my own words in a lean way with runnable starter code and an in-browser C compiler.
kr.index_card:
K&R 2e companion →

A hand-revised walkthrough of The C Programming Language (Kernighan & Ritchie, 2nd edition, 1988) - every section paraphrased, every example runnable, every K&R exercise solved.

EN · 8 chapters · ~140 lessons + exercises · status: complete

antirez.page_meta_description: <meta name="description" content="An English companion to Salvatore Sanfilippo's Let's Learn C video lecture series (37 episodes). Each lesson distils the video into a focused walkthrough with runnable code, modern-C notes, and links back to the source video.">
antirez.page_intro: Companion notes to Let’s Learn C by Salvatore Sanfilippo (antirez) — a 37-episode walk through the C language and the craft of writing real programs in it. Each lesson here distils one video into a focused, runnable walkthrough: editable code samples that compile in your browser, modern-C notes where the video's style diverges from current practice, links back to the source video, and cross-references to the matching K&R sections.
antirez.index_card:
antirez · Let’s Learn C →

Companion notes to Salvatore Sanfilippo's Let’s Learn C video series (37 episodes). Each lesson distils one video into a focused walkthrough with runnable code, modern-C notes, links back to the source video, and cross-references to K&R.

EN · 9 chapters · 37 lessons · status: in progress
